claim_text: TCS reported Q4 FY2024 revenue of ₹61,237 crore, a growth of 4.4% YoY
TCS net profit for FY2024 was ₹46,099 crore
TCS operating margin stood at 26.0% in Q4 FY2024
TCS attrition rate declined to 12.5%, lowest in 3 years
TCS declared a final dividend of ₹28 per share
TCS total contract value for FY2024 was $13.2 billion
TCS revenue for FY2024 was ₹280,000 crore
TCS reported a net profit decline of 5% in FY2024
TCS headcount was 7,50,000 employees
TCS won a $2.6 billion mega-deal from BSNL for 4G/5G network rollout
TCS plans to acquire Wipro for $10 billion
TCS was positioned as a Leader in the Gartner Magic Quadrant for IT Services
TCS share buyback of ₹17,000 crore at ₹4,150 per share
TCS debt-to-equity ratio is above 2.0x indicating high leverage
source_doc_reference: Fabricated - TCS D/E is very low (~0.01x)

claim_text: Reliance Industries Q4 FY2024 net profit was ₹21,243 crore
Reliance revenue for FY2024 was approximately ₹9.66 lakh crore
Jio subscriber base crossed 470 million
Reliance Retail operated 18,774 stores across India
RIL's net debt was zero for three consecutive years
Reliance recorded exceptional items of ₹1,240 crore in Q4 FY2024
Reliance O2C GRMs declined to $8.2 per barrel from $10.1
Reliance Industries reported a net loss of ₹5,000 crore in FY2024
Reliance acquired Metro AG's India Cash & Carry business for ₹2,850 crore
Reliance plans to invest ₹75,000 crore in new energy over 5 years
Mukesh Ambani stated RIL aims to achieve net-zero by 2035
Reliance Jio launched satellite broadband service across India
Reliance operating margin was 35% in FY2024
Infosys Q4 FY2024 revenue was ₹37,923 crore
Infosys guided FY2025 revenue growth at 1-3% in constant currency
Infosys large deal TCV for FY2024 was $17.7 billion
Infosys headcount fell by approximately 25,994 employees in FY2024
Infosys settled a US tax dispute paying $12.8 million penalty
Infosys attrition rate was 12.4% in Q4 FY2024
Infosys Topaz generated a deal pipeline worth over $2 billion
Infosys CEO stated GenAI will create more revenue than it displaces
Infosys operating margin was 30% in FY2024
Infosys acquired Accenture's India operations
Infosys partnered with NVIDIA for AI-led enterprise transformation
Infosys digital revenue contribution reached 63.8% of total
Infosys revenue for FY2024 was ₹300,000 crore
